pork.name: Pork
pork.description: A savory meat ingredient often used in stews, rice bowls, and grilled dishes.

beef.name: Beef
beef.description: A rich protein used for bulgogi, soups, rice bowls, and festive dishes.

chicken.name: Chicken
chicken.description: A mild protein that works well in soups, braises, and everyday meals.

mackerel.name: Mackerel
mackerel.description: An oily fish with a deep flavor, commonly grilled or braised.

salmon.name: Salmon
salmon.description: A tender fish with a rich texture and bright color.

tuna.name: Tuna
tuna.description: A firm seafood ingredient used in rice dishes, salads, and quick meals.

gosari.name: Gosari
gosari.description: Bracken fern shoots with an earthy flavor, often seasoned as namul.

spinach.name: Spinach
spinach.description: A green vegetable often blanched and seasoned with sesame oil.

bean_sprout.name: Bean Sprout
bean_sprout.description: Soybean sprouts with a crisp texture and clean flavor.

mung_bean_sprout.name: Mung Bean Sprout
mung_bean_sprout.description: Tender sprouts used in light namul, soups, and stir-fries.

shiitake.name: Shiitake
shiitake.description: A mushroom with deep umami and a firm bite.

oyster_mushroom.name: Oyster Mushroom
oyster_mushroom.description: A soft mushroom that absorbs seasoning and broth well.

enoki.name: Enoki
enoki.description: Thin, crisp mushrooms often used in soups and hot pots.

carrot.name: Carrot
carrot.description: A sweet vegetable that adds color and texture.

zucchini.name: Zucchini
zucchini.description: A mild squash commonly sauteed or added to stews.

cucumber.name: Cucumber
cucumber.description: A refreshing vegetable used raw, seasoned, or pickled.

gochujang.name: Gochujang
gochujang.description: A fermented red pepper paste with spicy, sweet, and savory depth.

soysauce.name: Soy Sauce
soysauce.description: A salty fermented sauce used as a base seasoning.

soybean.name: Soybean Paste
soybean.description: A fermented soybean paste that gives soups and sauces deep savoriness.

ssamjang.name: Ssamjang
ssamjang.description: A thick savory sauce used for wraps and grilled foods.

sesame_oil.name: Sesame Oil
sesame_oil.description: A fragrant oil that adds nutty aroma to finished dishes.

egg.name: Egg
egg.description: A versatile ingredient used as protein, garnish, or binder.

avocado.name: Avocado
avocado.description: A creamy ingredient that can add richness to modern rice bowls.
